mapper.select: SELECT ZPDISURVERID FROM dced_prj_survey WHERE ZPDILINENIODEID = #{nodeId} LIMIT 1
SELECT ZPDISURVERTYPE FROM dced_prj_survey WHERE ZPDILINENIODEID = #{nodeId} LIMIT 1

SELECT ZPDIPOSITIONID AS position_id, ZPDISURVERID AS survey_id, ZPDIPOSX AS pos_x, ZPDIPOSY AS pos_y, ZPDIPOSZ AS pos_z FROM dced_prj_surveyposition WHERE ZPDISURVERID = #{surveyId} ORDER BY ZPDIPOSITIONID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dced_prj_survey ( ZPDISURVERID, ZPDILINENIODEID, ZPDISURVERTYPE, ZPDIMARK ) VALUES ( #{surveyId}, #{nodeId}, #{surveyType}, #{mark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE dced_prj_survey SET ZPDITIFFile = NULL WHERE ZPDISURVERID = #{surveyId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dced_prj_surveyposition ( ZPDIPOSITIONID, ZPDISURVERID, ZPDIPOSX, ZPDIPOSY, ZPDIPOSZ ) VALUES ( #{positionId}, #{surveyId}, #{posX}, #{posY}, #{posZ} )
